video.title: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO): How to Rank #1 on ChatGPT & Perplexity
video.angle: New B2B marketing trend targeting AI search recommendations
video.hook: B2B buyers are no longer searching Google. They are asking ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity for software and vendor recommendations. Here is the exact strategy to optimize your B2B brand so AI search engines recommend you first.

production.style: Ken Burns animated slides featuring Byte the Robot. Narration first, results-focused.

scenes.title: The Hook (0:00â€“0:30)
scenes.voiceover: B2B buyers are no longer searching Google. They are asking ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity for software and vendor recommendations. In this video, I will show you the exact strategy to optimize your brand so AI engines recommend you first.
scenes.visual_note: Introduce Byte the Robot in a confident, welcoming pose showing the main pipeline metrics overlay.

scenes.title: The Problem (0:30â€“1:30)
scenes.voiceover: Traditional search engine optimization is dying. Blog posts, keyword stuffing, and backlink networks don't work when users ask ChatGPT 'what is the best AI tool for my agency'. The AI doesn't show Google search results; it summarizes its training data.
scenes.visual_note: Byte looking overwhelmed by manual files, showing chaotic workflows.

scenes.title: The Stack (1:30â€“2:30)
scenes.voiceover: We use a Generative Engine Optimization strategy. We crawl top-ranking articles, analyze LLM citation patterns, format our site metadata for LLM crawlers, and seed semantic mentions across high-domain platforms. This shapes how AI perceives our brand.
scenes.visual_note: Byte proudly pointing to the 3-tool workflow stack diagrams.

scenes.title: The Build (2:30â€“6:00)
scenes.voiceover: Here is the technical execution. We edit our schema markup, create clean XML datasets for web crawlers, analyze how Claude summarizes our product description, and run test queries on major AI engines to measure our recommendation rank.
scenes.visual_note: Byte dressed as a developer in front of a sleek terminal showing code execution.

scenes.title: The Results (6:00â€“7:00)
scenes.voiceover: By implementing these optimization steps, our software tool jumped from unlisted to the top recommendation for five high-intent AI search queries. We got high-quality B2B trials for absolutely zero ad spend.
scenes.visual_note: Byte celebrating, with massive green before/after comparison metrics in the background.

scenes.title: The CTA (7:00â€“end)
scenes.voiceover: Our complete GEO auditing sheet and meta optimization template are linked in the description below. Make sure tograb your free audit template, and start ranking on AI engines today. This channel needs your support. Please subscribe, leave a word of appreciation for the author, and may God bless you.
scenes.visual_note: Byte gesturing toward a glowing download link.
